working_on: Issue #113 HNSW sync_threshold prevention bundled with mempalace 3.3.5 upgrade: project-side wrapper tool + boot/rebuild wiring + ADR 0079 + Issue correction + new upstream Issue
outcome_summary: Issue #113 closed via ADR 0079 (HNSW sync_threshold tuning). Hybrid posture: project-side `mempalace_set_sync_threshold.py` sets steady-state 100 on live palace via chromadb 1.5.x's `configuration` channel; bulk rebuilds inherit mempalace's `_HNSW_BLOAT_GUARD` 50_000 default. Phase 1.5a empirical verification surfaced Issue #113's three premise errors (mechanism: mempalace's 50_000, not chromadb's 1000; version: 3.3.4, not 3.3.5; line numbers stale); four-section correction comment posted before close. User-directed safeguards: mandatory --backup-dir, pre/post-switch verification, palace health probe. 27 pytests green; live palace converged from 50_000 to 100 (backup at ~/.mempalace/palace.S-0145-pre-threshold-switch). Mempalace 3.3.4 → 3.3.5 + chromadb 1.5.9 (transitive) bundled via in-session pyproject + uv.lock edit (Dependabot PR #104 closed stale, 19 commits behind main). New upstream Issue MemPalace/mempalace#1489 proposes `--hnsw-sync-threshold N` flag. 10th consecutive ADR 0053 negative finding (0/4 criteria satisfied). 4 commits: eager-claim be4574c + dep-bump 394fc52 + deliverable 8e10416 + close (pending). mempalace_unavailable_acknowledged: mempalace_diary_write returned MCP error -32000 throughout shutdown despite mempalace_status, mempalace_add_drawer, and mempalace_search all working — substrate intermittent at diary_write specifically. Diary content preserved as a `wing_claude/diary`-room drawer via mempalace_add_drawer fallback (drawer_wing_claude_diary_ff8f23ac5c052a96e276cbbc).

scope_delivery.note: All approved-plan phases landed: Phase 1 upgrade + Phase 1.5a/b empirical verification + Phase 2 tool + tests + Phase 3 boot/rebuild wiring + Phase 4 in-session empirical exercise (verify-only → apply with backup → idempotency → direct chromadb inspection) + Phase 5 ADR + ops doc + adr/README + ENGINE_LOG + STATE.md + Issue #113 correction comment + Issue #113 close summary + new upstream Issue #1489 + MemPalace decision drawer + diary-equivalent drawer (fallback due to diary_write -32000). Plan revised mid-session at Phase 1.5a per user pushback when the empirical verification surfaced the deeper mechanism premise error (50_000 vs 1000); user directed hybrid posture + safeguards. Three layers of user-pushback-driven scope correction preserved across plan revision.
